title: LOKIPA Christmas Inflatable Reindeer Antler Ring Toss Games For Christmas Family Party Fun Games
features: MATERIAL : This Inflatable reindeer antler made of environmental PVC,light weight and reusable.
FUN:The inflatable reindeer ring toss game is hopefully and silly game suit for both kids and adult, great fun for all the family in the Christmas season.
Size:Inflatable reindeer antler hat size are 80cm when inflation , normal size approx 40cm /15.75" the toss Rings size are :7cm / 2.75" ; Inner diameter :12.cm /4.7"
HOW TO PLAY :Simply inflate and play by standing the same distance away, and taking it in turns to try to get the hoop.
PACKAGE INCLUDE:Inflatable reindeer antler games comes with 4 inflatable rings in Christmas theme box, you can hang the inflatable rings on Antler Hat .
description: Product Description A great game to play with family and friends this Christmas! Christmas is coming..... When christmas coming means happinee is coming ,every family will look for some fun and silly games to makes the party time more fun ,so this christmas ring toss game is just design fit for every family,there are easy to play but full of fun and laugher when playing ,they can not just bring your family happiness but also make adult and kids closer to each other.Really an ideal game for your family. Size The antler ring toss game includes 4 rings The length of reindeer antler approx 43cm/17" The excircle diameter of hat approx 25cm/9.8" The inner diameter approx 14cm/5.5" The diameter of inflatable rings approx 19cm/7.5" Packing with beautiful box This christmas ring toss game packing with a beautuful box which design with cute christmas theme image that make this game full of christmas atmosphere. It easy to carry and box makes it fit for as a christmas gift to kids. Play this game with all your family member ,share your happiness with each other Share your happiness with each other A Great Game to play with Family and Friends During This Christmas!Share your happiness with each other Your family and friends will want more laughter ,just playing this games ! Enjoy the Great Happiness Features Idear christmas gift Christmas ring toss game is an ideal christmas gift for your kids How to play? Simply inflate and play by standing the same distance amay and taking it in turns to try to get the hoop. Reindeer antler ring toss game is great for boys Merry Christmas! Great gift. Fit for kids and adult Reindeer antler ring toss game is great for girls and adult.
